gaps: AI/machine learning training use not addressed

label_notes: Source: training knowledge (live fetch blocked). Walmart operates both online (walmart.com) and physical stores with integrated data collection. Notably collects and uses biometric data (facial recognition in stores). Does not sell data to third parties for their marketing, but shares with advertising partners. Key gap: limited transparency on biometric data handling and AI training use.
